summary: Testing P0/P1 bug fixes and PhotoPicker feature for CarryOn™ estate planning app. All tests PASSED. P0 BUG (invitation 404) fixed - FRONTEND_URL now correctly configured. P1 BUG (Guardian disclaimer) fixed - compact single-line disclaimer. P1 FEATURE (PhotoPicker) working - crop/zoom dialog with camera and library options.

minor.issue: Console warnings: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent in PhotoPicker source picker

passed_tests: P0 BUG FIX: /accept-invitation/:token page loads correctly (no 404)
P0 BUG FIX: Invitation API returns beneficiary data with token 6c28caf9-814a-4db5-b137-d169c7cc85c8
P0 BUG FIX: Accept invitation page shows benefactor name 'Founder CarryOn'
P0 BUG FIX: Accept invitation page shows beneficiary info 'Test Invitee' with email and relation
P0 BUG FIX: Password form fields (Create Password, Confirm Password) present and functional
P0 BUG FIX: Submit button enables/disables correctly based on form validation
P1 BUG FIX: Estate Guardian page shows compact single-line disclaimer
P1 BUG FIX: Chat input and suggested questions visible without scrolling
P1 BUG FIX: Action buttons (Analyze Vault, Generate Checklist, Analyze Readiness) present
P1 FEATURE: PhotoPicker component displays camera icon avatar in Add Beneficiary modal
P1 FEATURE: PhotoPicker source picker dialog shows 'Take Photo' and 'Choose from Library' options
P1 FEATURE: Color picker for avatar colors present in modal
INTEGRATION: Resend Invitation button works - 'Invitation sent successfully' toast shown
INTEGRATION: Beneficiaries page lists existing beneficiaries with status badges
API: GET /api/invitations/:token returns 200 with valid beneficiary data
API: GET /api/invitations/invalid-token returns 404
API: POST /api/auth/dev-login works correctly
API: GET /api/estates returns estate list
API: GET /api/beneficiaries/:estate_id returns beneficiary list
API: POST /api/beneficiaries/:id/invite resends invitation successfully
critical_code_review_comments: FRONTEND_URL in backend/.env now correctly on its own line (line 18) - P0 root cause fixed
GuardianPage.js disclaimer reduced to single compact line (lines 253-259)
PhotoPicker.js properly integrated at line 512 in BeneficiariesPage.js
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 bugs all fixed. Invitation flow works end-to-end. PhotoPicker with react-easy-crop integrated. Test beneficiary 'Test Invitee' (invitee@test.com) has invitation_status='sent' with token 6c28caf9-814a-4db5-b137-d169c7cc85c8. Guardian page has compact disclaimer. Console warnings exist for DialogContent aria-describedby but non-functional.

P0_invitation_404.root_cause: FRONTEND_URL env var was concatenated with VAPID_CLAIMS_EMAIL line without newline
P0_invitation_404.fix: FRONTEND_URL now on its own line (line 18 in backend/.env)
P0_invitation_404.verification: Accept invitation page at /accept-invitation/:token loads correctly showing benefactor and beneficiary info

P1_guardian_disclaimer.description: Disclaimer reduced from multi-line paragraph to single compact line
P1_guardian_disclaimer.verification: Chat area maximized, disclaimer visible as single line with Disclaimer: prefix

P1_photo_picker.verification: PhotoPicker visible in Add Beneficiary modal with all options working
